name: Berlin
author: Valdotorium
description:
Custom map of Germanys capital, Berlin, including most of the city area, BER, Spandau and a bit of Potsdam. Demand Data was procedurally generated using generation scripts from the patcher. Data quality: Good (for generated data standards).
NOTE: population counts on Railyard probably differ from the values in game. This map has a population of 3.9 Million in game.
